H3 cell ids for lon/lat points (as H3 strings)

Source: R/hex.R
hex_id_from_lonlat.Rd

Indexes points to H3 cells at res via the DuckDB h3 extension. Returns the H3 string form so ids are exact in R.

Usage

hex_id_from_lonlat(lon, lat, res = HEX_RES, con = NULL)

Arguments

lon, lat

numeric vectors of longitude / latitude (EPSG:4326)

res

H3 resolution (default HEX_RES)

con

optional DuckDB connection (a temporary one is used if NULL)

Value

character vector of H3 string ids, aligned to the inputs
